# PIOS — Personal Intelligent Operating System
# VeritasIQ Technologies Ltd · pios.veritasiq.io
# llms.txt v2.4 — Claude for Chrome integration manifest

## What is PIOS?

PIOS is a personal AI operating system for multi-domain professionals.
It unifies academic research, FM consulting delivery, SaaS business operations,
task management, calendar, email triage, expenses, payroll, and meeting notes
into a single Claude-powered platform.

## Live context API

Claude for Chrome can fetch a structured snapshot of the user's current state:

  GET /api/claude-context

Returns: urgent tasks, overdue items, today's calendar, thesis progress,
email action queue, expenses, notifications, meeting pending actions,
and cross-platform KPIs (VeritasEdge™, InvestiScript).

Requires: user must be signed in at pios.veritasiq.io (Supabase session cookie
shared with the browser — no separate authentication needed for Claude for Chrome).

## Authentication

PIOS uses Supabase Auth (magic link / Google OAuth).
The /api/claude-context endpoint uses the existing browser session cookie.
If the user is not signed in, the endpoint returns { authenticated: false }
with a sign_in_url to redirect to.

## Quick actions Claude can perform

- Create tasks:     POST /api/tasks { title, domain, priority, due_date }
- Sync email:       POST /api/email/sync
- Log expense:      POST /api/expenses { action: "create", description, amount, currency, category, domain, date }
- Create meeting:   POST /api/meetings { title, raw_transcript, auto_process: true, domain }
- Get daily brief:  GET /api/brief
- Mark task done:   PATCH /api/tasks { id, status: "done" }

## Domains

Tasks and items are tagged with domains: academic, fm_consulting, saas, business, personal

## Platform

- Frontend: Next.js 14 / TypeScript
- AI: Anthropic Claude (claude-sonnet-4-20250514)
- Database: Supabase PostgreSQL (EU West)
- Version: PIOS v2.9

## Confidentiality

This is a private application. Access is restricted to authorised users.
